instruction:
What is the value of $\begin{aligned}\sqrt[3]{\sqrt[5]{\frac{32}{5}}-\sqrt[5]{\frac{27}{5}}}\end{aligned}$?

Options:
A. $\sqrt[5]{\frac1{49}}+\sqrt[5]{\frac3{16}}-\sqrt[5]{\frac9{16}}$
B. $\sqrt[5]{\frac1{25}}+\sqrt[5]{\frac3{25}}-\sqrt[5]{\frac9{25}}$
C. $\sqrt[5]{\frac1{36}}+\sqrt[5]{\frac3{25}}-\sqrt[5]{\frac9{25}}$
D. $\sqrt[5]{\frac1{25}}+\sqrt[5]{\frac4{25}}-\sqrt[5]{\frac9{16}}$
E. $\sqrt[5]{\frac1{25}}+\sqrt[5]{\frac3{16}}-\sqrt[5]{\frac9{25}}$
F. $\sqrt[5]{\frac1{16}}+\sqrt[5]{\frac3{25}}-\sqrt[5]{\frac9{25}}$
G. $\sqrt[5]{\frac2{25}}+\sqrt[5]{\frac4{25}}-\sqrt[5]{\frac9{25}}$
H. $\sqrt[5]{\frac1{25}}+\sqrt[5]{\frac4{25}}-\sqrt[5]{\frac9{49}}$
I. $\sqrt[5]{\frac1{27}}+\sqrt[5]{\frac3{27}}-\sqrt[5]{\frac9{27}}$
J. $\sqrt[5]{\frac1{25}}+\sqrt[5]{\frac5{25}}-\sqrt[5]{\frac9{36}}$
